headline: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Acquires Med James To Expand Specialty Insurance Reach
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) has acquired Med James, Inc., a Kansas based managing general agency and wholesale insurance broker. The transaction expands Gallagher's specialty insurance platform and will be integrated into its Risk Placement Services division. The deal broadens Gallagher's reach with retail agents that rely on customized and niche insurance solutions. For investors tracking Arthur J. Gallagher, this move adds detail to the story around its insurance brokerage and risk...

headline: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Stock May Trade At A Discount To Fair Value Yet A Premium On Earnings
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher stock has delivered a 101.5% return over the past 5 years, yet its current checks send mixed valuation signals, with an intrinsic value estimate from the Excess Returns model pointing to a discount while market multiples lean the other way. A 101.5% 5 year return sets the bar higher for new investors, as a lot of the earlier upside has already played out in the share price. Ongoing acquisitions that expand Gallagher's brokerage and specialty insurance footprint can...

headline: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Rebounds Sharply, Is The Upside Already Priced In?
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) has caught investor attention after a recent stretch of positive share performance, with the stock up 3.2% over the past week and 19.5% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Arthur J. Gallagher. Set against a 1 day share price return of 3.2% and a 90 day share price return of 18.8%, Arthur J.
